title: Central Bank of India – Assistant General Manager – 15 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India AGM Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 15 Assistant General Manager Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central Bank of India AGM Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 15 new vacancies across Mumbai. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E, Post Graduate, CA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 30-04-2026, and closes on 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Central Bank of India website, centralbank.bank.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Central Bank of India (Human Capital Management - Recruitment & Promotion, Central Office)

selection_process: Online Examination (100 Marks) + Interview (100 Marks) | Weightage 70:30
how_to_apply: Candidates can apply only online from 30-04-2026 to 25-05-2026 at the link https://ibpsreg.ibps.in/cbiagmapr26/. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before applying, candidates should scan their photograph (200x230 pixels, 20-50 KB), signature (140x60 pixels, 10-20 KB), left thumb impression (240x240 pixels, 20-50 KB), and handwritten declaration (800x400 pixels, 50-100 KB). A valid personal email ID and contact number must be kept active till completion of the recruitment process. Not more than one application should be submitted by any candidate. In case of multiple applications, only the latest valid (completed) application will be retained.
